# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance wins** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 delivers the Skia m151 engine, sweeping allocation-free performance improvements, and expanded WebAssembly support. The release syncs the bundled renderer to Chrome milestone 151 and merges upstream bug fixes. Several hot paths — HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, SKShaper glyph reads, and four-byte tag parsing — now run allocation-free. WebAssembly gains Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries for .NET 11.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151, bringing upstream rendering improvements and bug fixes into the 4.151 line. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes merged** — Three incremental syncs from the Skia upstream applied bug fixes landed in the chrome/m151 branch after the initial milestone cut. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **CPU raster regression resolved** — Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to fix a performance regression in CPU raster rendering introduced by the m151 engine update. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char> directly, eliminating string allocations at the call site and speeding up hot-path colour conversion. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — Removed an unnecessary `unsafe` modifier from GRContextOptions so callers no longer need to enable unsafe code just to set graphics context options. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A native handle was leaked when decoding a region of an SKData-backed image; the internal object is now correctly released on all code paths. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Platform

- **WebAssembly SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition removed** — Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer emit macro-redefinition warnings. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))
- **Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries added for .NET 11 WASM** — Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6-built native libraries needed to run SkiaSharp on WebAssembly targets built against .NET 11. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Text-rendering hot paths made allocation-free** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now pools its UTF-8 encoding, HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse eliminate a per-call char[4] allocation, and SKShaper reads glyph results via zero-copy spans — reducing GC pressure on busy text-rendering loops. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Adds Emscripten 5.0.6 support for .NET 11 WebAssembly, makes Buffer.AddUtf8(string) allocation-free via pooled UTF-8 encoding, and eliminates the per-call char[4] allocation in Tag.Parse.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Fixed the WebAssembly Skia build by removing the redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define upstream, and added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly support ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 brought the chrome/m151 upstream bug-fix syncs, allocation-free performance improvements across HarfBuzz and SKShaper hot paths, SKColor span overloads, a native leak fix in SKImage.FromEncodedData, and Emscripten 5.0.6 support for .NET 11 WebAssembly.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM build cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
